title: senna mexicana var. shaferi
intro: Senna mexicana var. shaferi, also known as Mexican senna, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the legume family and is native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which have been used for centuries to treat various digestive issues. The health benefits of Senna mexicana var. shaferi include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, relieve constipation, and treat conditions such as dyspepsia and irritable bowel syndrome. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions and dried leaf extracts, which can be used as a laxative and to promote digestive health.
